channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple pot holes outside Ashley manor gates, 18th March
item.description:
Multiple pot holes have been here for months, really dangerous. The other day I watched a woman in a wheelchair get stuck! Needs to be fixed asap, along with multiple other pot holes on the London road around sixways… awful

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219a, London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working Southfield rise, 18th March
item.description:
Street light not working Southfield rise. Outside number 10. Last 2 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southfield Rise, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot whole outside number 10/12, 18th March
item.description:
Pot hole getting bigger each week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Southfield Rise, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes at entrance to Todpool house, 18th March
item.description:
What3words: ///shed.banquets.closets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmiths Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 potholes in road. Small but deep, 18th March
item.description:
On Sandywell lane, there are three deep potholes that are going to cause damage to cars. Two are close each other, near the fishing lake gate. The other one is less than 20 yards up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes, 18th March
item.description:
Reported last month nothing done !!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 18th March
item.description:
Reported in January, February and now March !!! Fix it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van parked illegally, 18th March
item.description:
Van parked on double yellow lines opposite a junction making it dangerous to pass the junction Owner has a van parked up the road on single yellow line aswell Second time Iv reported this time
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen down trees on path, 18th March
item.description:
Fallen down trees on Cotswold Way path between Ciorndean Lane and Belas Knap monument.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Corndean Lane, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicular access to house blocked, 18th March
item.description:
Vehicular access to my house has been blocked by roadworkers. This means that my wife and I are unable to park our car in our driveway. We understand that electric charging points are being installed about 30 metres away, which is shown one.network. Could you please arrange for the road to be fixed as soon as possible so that we can use our driveway. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Barbridge Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 18th March
item.description:
Grid locked for an hour and half. Please can someone explain to me why and get down here and sort it out. Police have said this is down to GCC and are not helping.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of clothes bags and rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
There has been a large amount of clothing bags and rubbish bags dumped by the old clothing bins in the Bath Terrace car park. This is starting to be targeted by scavengers and those known to police, causing risk to local neighbours as they are strong to congregate rifling through it all. Please arrange collection and removal urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide pothole next to substation, 18th March
item.description:
Located opposite No 62 at junction with Hospital Road. Located in cycleway in centre of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Keynsham Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

Located next to substation in centre of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Keynsham Road, Naunton, Cheltenham

item.title: Asbestos fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Fly tippers are dumping rubbish at the back of our houses and there are asbestos

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Coombe Glen Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rattling manhole cover, 18th March
item.description:
On the lefthand side as you turn into sandford mill road from London road, as if you're heading into town. On the corner of 125 London road, I understand that road works are due this evening but they don't include this issue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Sandford Mill Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped radiator, 18th March

Fly tipped radiator

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, London Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of electrical equipment including fridges and commercial printer as well as other items, 18th March
item.description:
Both sides of the road immediately south of the disused railway bridge on the first turning right off the A436 – lane leading to Syreford.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Syreford Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
